SAHARO India's 1st Youth Growth Ecosystem

Helping Youth Grow in Every Area of Life.

SAHARO — Indian youth को Career Uncertainty, Stress और Loneliness से बाहर निकलने के लिए Daily Progress Tracking, Career Backup Support, Expert Counselling एवं Offline Growth Club के ज़रिए एक One-stop Solution प्रदान करता है।

Every Youth Deserves a Better Future — Supporting Every Step of Your Journey.
Digital App

Study & Performance Tracking System

A personal dashboard that studies your effort, not just your scores — and adjusts your plan every single day.

01

Today's Plan

Your daily study plan, built from yesterday's performance.

02

Study Timer

Track focused hours and breaks — no more guesswork.

03

Performance Dashboard

See your strong and weak topics at a glance.

04

Score Reward

Earn a score for every consistent day — healthy competition, zero pressure.

05

Focus Mode

Notifications disappear while you study. Your phone works with you, not against you.

06

Community Zone

Suggest Friends & private chat — the first connection for students studying alone.

This all happens automatically. If the app senses a student is burning out or feeling stuck, it proactively guides them toward expert counselling — no manual check-ins required.
Offline Third Space

Saharo Growth Club

Café with Counselling — a stigma-free space where asking for help feels as easy as ordering a coffee.

01

Counselling Rooms

2–3 soundproof cabins, jahan career, mental health ya relationship — kuch bhi bina jhijhak keh sakte ho. Fee affordable rakhi gayi hai.

02

Wellness Café

Chai aur coffee ke bahane, counselling tak pahunchna easy ho jaata hai.

03

Wisdom Library

Distraction-free deep work zone — writers, researchers aur serious kaam karne walon ke liye. Syllabus revision ke liye nahi.

04

Community Zone

Disciplined mahaul mein naye log milte hain — akelapan yahin todta hai.

05

Event Space

Shaam ko open mic, shayari, career circles aur philosophy nights. Din mein co-working aur podcast recording.

Din mein focus · Shaam mein community — dono ek hi chhat ke neeche.

Career Backup
95%

Failed Aspirants Ke Jeevan Ko Redefine Karna.

SAHARO — Youths ki Growth ka Sahara.

आपके Interests, Strengths और Goals के आधार पर हम counselling session के ज़रिए मिलकर तय करेंगे कि आपके लिए कौन-सा Career Backup बेहतर रहेगा और उसे कैसे achieve किया जाए।

➜ SAHARO: आपको सही career चुनने, आवश्यक skills develop करने और relevant career opportunities तक पहुँचाने में help करता है।

1-to-1 Expert Conversation

Career Confusion से Best-Fit Career Success तक.

Step-by-Step Roadmap

Goal तक पहुंचने की clear action strategy.

Skills & Opportunities

सही नेटवर्क के माध्यम से Skill Development & Opportunities तक पहुंच.
